headlines.description: — Pascal Siakam scored 30 points, grabbed 14 rebounds and made a driving layup with 11.5 seconds left to lift Indiana to a 114-112 win over the Charlotte Hornets on Thursday night that snapped the Pacers' 13-game skid and finally gave coach Rick...
headlines.shortLinkText: Pacers beat Hornets 114-112 to end 13-game skid and give Rick Carlisle his 1,000th win

headlines.description: — Julius Randle had 28 points, 11 rebounds and eight assists to help the Minnesota Timberwolves hang on to beat the Cleveland Cavaliers 131-122 on Thursday night for their fourth consecutive victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: T-wolves beat Cavaliers 131-122 behind Randle's 28 points, set season highs for shooting percentages

headlines.description: — Lauri Markkanen had 33 points and seven rebounds and the Utah Jazz snapped a five-game losing streak with a 116-114 victory over the Dallas Mavericks on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lauri Markkanen scores 33, rallies the Jazz to a 116-114 win over the Mavericks
